# 🤖 Dan Ai

Dan Ai is a smart, lightweight AI chatbot system designed to learn from user input and reply contextually. It supports custom teaching, reply memory, and seamless integration with GoatBot.

---

## ✨ Features

- Natural language chatting
- Custom question-answer teaching
- Context-aware replies
- Lightweight REST API backend
- Compatible with GoatBot V2
